productDisplayName: Mother Earth Men Solid Black Churidar
description: Composition Black chudidar made of 100% cotton, that has a waist line with tie-strings, and extra panel and stitch detailing along the crotch line Fitting Mid-rise, slim Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleed Flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron An ethnic kurta is never complete unless you pair it with an apt piece of chudidar. The black will go great with kurtas of all earth and aqua tones and add that extra weight to your personality. Model statistics The model wears chudidars of length 41.5" Height-6.1'; Waist-31"
